data.title: IFF Declares Dividend for Second Quarter 2026
data.description: New York-based company IFF (NYSE: IFF) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be payable on July 10, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of June 18, 2026. IFF is a leading global company in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients, health, and biosciences, specializing in creating innovative and sustainable products that enhance daily experiences. With a mission to bring joy through a combination of science, creativity, and compassion, IFF continues to drive advancements in various sectors.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pares Losses, Powell Notes Resilient Economy; Mag 7 Earnings Loom (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decrease following the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain unchanged interest rates. The upcoming earnings reports from major technology companies are anticipated. The Nasdaq managed to reduce its losses, with Chairman Powell acknowledging the economy's resilience. Additionally, earnings updates from top companies are on the horizon, with expectations set for significant impacts on market trends.

data.title: Amazon Beats Q1 Estimates, Issues Strong Guidance As AWS Growth Accelerates
data.description: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) released its first-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations with a revenue of $181.52 billion, higher than the anticipated $177.30 billion. Earnings came in at $2.78 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.66 per share, with a 17% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year. Revenue by segment stood at $104.1 billion for North America (up 12%), $39.8 billion for International (up 19%), and $37.6 billion for Amazon Web Services (up 28%). Operating cash flow rose by 30% to $148.5 billion over the last 12 months, while free cash flow decreased to $1.2 billion due to increased property purchases. Amazon stock is currently trading at high levels, with strong performance driving investor interest. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: CVR Partners Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: CVR Partners, LP, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UAN, based in Sugar Land, Texas, revealed their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported a significant increase in net income, reaching $50 million ($4.72 per common unit), compared to $27 million ($2.56 per common unit) in the same quarter of 2025. Additionally, their EBITDA rose to $78 million from $53 million year-over-year. The net sales for the first quarter of 2026 were $180 million, up from $143 million in 2025. This marks substantial growth for CVR Partners in terms of financial performance.

data.title: Microsoft Q3 Highlights: AI Revenue Up 123% YoY, Hits Annual Run Rate $37 Billion, Helps With Double Beat
data.description: In its latest financial report, Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) revealed its third-quarter results, which showcased impressive numbers. The company reported a revenue of $82.9 billion, marking an 18% increase from the previous year and surpassing the estimated $81.39 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were reported at $4.27, exceeding the anticipated $4.06. The revenue breakdown by segment is as follows: Productivity and Business Processes brought in $35.0 billion (+17% YoY), Intelligent Cloud generated $34.7 billion (+30% YoY), and More Personal Computing saw $13.2 billion (-1% YoY). Microsoft's overall Cloud revenue amounted to $54.5 billion, up by 29% YoY. The company's robust performance demonstrates significant growth in its various divisions.

data.title: BondBloxx Announces Upcoming Changes to its ETF Lineup
data.description: BondBloxx has revealed their future plans to introduce a series of new BondBloxx ETFs after conducting a thorough evaluation of their current portfolio. The company is set to launch several ETFs to expand their offerings and cater to investor needs. This move comes as part of BondBloxx's strategic growth initiative to leverage opportunities in the market. The number of new ETFs to be introduced has not been disclosed, but investors can anticipate a diverse range of options in the near future. BondBloxx’s decision to expand their ETF lineup demonstrates their commitment to providing a wider selection of investment opportunities for their clients.

data.title: Alphabet Stock Climbs After Q1 EPS Blows Past Estimates: Details
data.description: Alphabet Inc. released their first-quarter earnings report, exceeding analyst expectations. They reported quarterly earnings of $5.11 per share, surpassing the estimated $2.62 by 95.04%. Revenue for the quarter was $109.9 billion, higher than the expected $106.93 billion and up from $90.23 billion last year. Google Services revenues also saw growth, increasing by 16% to $89.6 billion. The stock price for GOOGL is currently active and can be monitored for further updates. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Empire State Realty Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESRT), based in NYC, is a Real Estate Investment Trust with a focus on the New York City area. They own and manage a collection of prime office, retail, and multifamily properties that are modernized, well-leased, and strategically situated. One of their key assets is the Empire State Building, renowned for its Observatory. ESRT is known for its commitment to energy efficiency and environmental quality. In a recent update, the company shared its operational and financial performance.
Impinj unveils Q1 2026 financials.

data.title: Q2 Holdings, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: A digital transformation solutions provider for financial services, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO), reported its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company disclosed a revenue of $216.5 million for the quarter, marking a 14% increase from the same period last year and a 4% growth from the preceding quarter of 2025. The GAAP gross margin for the quarter stood at 59.1%, showing a significant improvement from 53.2% in the prior-year quarter and 55.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: FICO to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference on May 5th
data.description: FICO, a globally recognized analytics software leader listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol FICO, shared that its CEO, Will Lansing, and CFO, Steve Weber, are scheduled to speak at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference on May 5th at 14:15 BST (13:15 UTC) in London. The event will take place at The Langham, London, 1C Portland Place, London W1B 1JA, with the presentation being live-streamed on FICO’s official website www.fico.com/investors. The session will remain accessible for viewing until May 5, 2027.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces New Phase of Home Sites Now Open at Oakbridge Crossing in Flower Mound, Texas
data.description: A luxury home builder, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), revealed the launch of a latest phase at Oakbridge Crossing in Flower Mound, Texas on April 29, 2026. As the primary constructor of high-end residences in the nation, Toll Brothers released new home sites with prices initiating at $1.49 million. These home sites present ample space and sophisticated designs in an extremely sought-after area in the bustling town of Flower Mound in the Dallas-Fort Worth region.
Financial firm reveals Q1 earnings.

data.title: Adecoagro announces the filing of its form 20-F for fiscal year 2025
data.description: Luxembourg, 29th April 2026 - Adecoagro S.A., a prominent sustainable production company operating in South America, has officially disclosed the submission of its Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on 31st December 2025 to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The Company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AGRO, reaffirms its commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance by making this important filing publicly available.

data.title: Capstone Copper Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Capstone Copper Corp. (TSX: CS) (ASX: CSC) released financial data for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The results were reported in United States dollars and on a 100% basis. Cashel Meagher, the President and CEO of Capstone, noted that Q1 2026 represented the sixth consecutive quarter of record EBITDA generation due to strong operational performance. For further details, the webcast presentation for Capstone’s Q1 2026 can be accessed through the provided link.

data.title: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) shared its financial performance for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the company offered financial forecasts for the second quarter and full year of 2026. Detailed guidance can be accessed on ILPT’s website in the Quarterly Results section: https://www.ilptreit.com/investors/financials-information/quarterly-results/default.aspx. A conference call has been scheduled for Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Participants can obtain further information about the call on the company's website.

data.title: Invitation Homes Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. unveiled its financial and operational results for the First Quarter of 2026. The company reported a total revenue boost of 8.8% from last year, reaching $734 million. At the same time, property operating and maintenance costs rose by 5.8% to $251 million. Despite this, the net income available to common stockholders saw a decrease of 3.5% to $160 million, equivalent to $0.26 per share. Invitation Homes Inc. is recognized as the leading single-family home leasing and management firm in the United States.

data.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a GAAP net income of $12.3 million, equivalent to $0.07 per diluted common share. Their Distributable Earnings, a non-GAAP financial metric, amounted to $13.5 million, translating to $0.09 per diluted common share on a fully converted basis. Furthermore, the Distributable Earnings before realized losses, another non-GAAP financial measure, stood at $25.9 million.

data.title: Amrize Grows Revenue 4.7% in First Quarter and Reaffirms 2026 Guidance
data.description: Amrize (AMRZ) reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. Jan Jenisch, the Chairman and CEO, expressed gratitude towards the 19,000 Amrize employees for achieving a 4.7% revenue growth during this seasonally small quarter. The company is pleased with the progress made and the increasing customer demand in Building Materials. Amrize experienced growth in new project initiations and secured multi-year supply contracts for mega-projects, leading to a significant advancement.

data.title: Redwood Trust Reports First Quarter Financial Results; Mortgage Banking Production Reaches a Record $8.5 Billion
data.description: Redwood Trust, Inc., a key player in improving housing accessibility for homebuyers and renters, released its financial outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The consolidated data showcased a GAAP net loss of $(0.07) for each basic and diluted common share. Meanwhile, Non-GAAP Earnings Available for Distribution ("EAD") saw a rise to $0.21 per share(1), surpassing the previous quarter. These figures demonstrate the company's commitment to financial growth and sustainability in the housing sector.
